name: Clay
description: Go-to-market platform combining data enrichment from 150+ providers with Claygent AI research and workflow automation.

seo.title: Clay — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Clay: Go-to-market platform combining data enrichment from 150+ providers with Claygent AI research and workflow automation.

when_to_use: Enriching prospect lists from 150+ data sources at once
AI Claygent researching company context before outreach
Building a custom ICP list with intent and technographic data
Automating GTM workflows triggered by CRM data changes
Data-enriched outbound sequences with personalized snippets

pros: Claygent automates web research at scale
Credit system lets you pay only for hits
Replaces dozens of scraping and enrichment tools
cons: Steep learning curve, requires ops expertise
Credit costs spiral fast on large lists
Not a sender - needs Outreach/Smartlead downstream
Templates change often, breaking existing flows
review.verdict: The dominant GTM data platform if you have an ops person; wasted seat without one.
review.best_for: Dedicated GTM engineers building custom enrichment workflows
review.not_for: Reps who just want to send emails without learning tables
